title: CRITICAL: Rotate all exposed API keys (Resend, Stripe, Neon)
description:
GitGuardian detected exposed secrets in git history. Keys that must be rotated immediately:
- Resend API key
- Stripe Secret Key + Publishable Key + Webhook Secret
- Neon database connection string (includes password)

After rotating: update all values in Vercel environment variables and redeploy.
